periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. Northeast wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.
